visa_types.name: Vocational Training
visa_types.documents_required: Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the checklists given on link website of the visa section Cameroon (https://url.uk.m.mimecastprotect.com/s/HcYVCkovoUOXBYw7T2fEsGuMhU?domain=jaunde.diplo.de). There you will find all relevant information like requested documents checklist, duration of the application process, fees, where to apply, etc.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[deu > cmr > en > Study Visa]
*Please note that the service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in XAF is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only Service Charge.
- VFS Service fee is non refundable.
visa_types.processing_time: Note: The Visa should be applied for with sufficient time before planned departure. The processing time for complete application documents is currently around three months. Processing may be delayed due to incomplete application documents or irregular processing measures. There is no entitlement to the issue of a visa within the specified processing time.
visa_types.overview:
Overview

Vocational Training in the health sector (mostly nursing)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

Vocational Training in the health sector (mostly nursing)

## Visa Fees

[deu > cmr > en > Study Visa]
*Please note that the service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in XAF is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only Service Charge.
- VFS Service fee is non refundable.

## Documents Required

Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the checklists given on link website of the visa section Cameroon (https://url.uk.m.mimecastprotect.com/s/HcYVCkovoUOXBYw7T2fEsGuMhU?domain=jaunde.diplo.de). There you will find all relevant information like requested documents checklist, duration of the application process, fees, where to apply, etc.

## Photo Specifications

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

## Processing Time

Note: The Visa should be applied for with sufficient time before planned departure. The processing time for complete application documents is currently around three months. Processing may be delayed due to incomplete application documents or irregular processing measures. There is no entitlement to the issue of a visa within the specified processing time.

## Online Application Forms

Below is the form that is required to be filled to submit your visa application:
- National Visa
 
Application Form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/#/videx-langfristiger-aufenthalt)
 (To be filled online - mandatory)
Instructions to complete an online form:
- Click on the form link above
- When the page opens complete the form
- Once complete print out the form on clear paper
- The complete printed set of your application form including the last barcoded page of your application form should be presented while submitting your application.
** The barcode page contains the necessary data in condensed and machine readable format.

visa_types.name: NATIONAL VISA CATEGORY D
visa_types.overview:
NATIONAL VISA CATEGORY D
- Study Visa (#studyvisa)
- Vocational Training (#vocationaltraining)
- Prior Approval from immigration authority (Ausländerbehörde) (#PriorApprovalfromimmigrationauthority(Ausländerbehörde))
visa_types.full_text:

- Study Visa (#studyvisa)

visa_types.overview:
Overview

Foreign students admitted to a German higher education institution (if applicable, after a language course preparing for studies) or to a preparatory college for foreign students (Studienkolleg) can apply for a visa for studies in Germany.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

Foreign students admitted to a German higher education institution (if applicable, after a language course preparing for studies) or to a preparatory college for foreign students (Studienkolleg) can apply for a visa for studies in Germany.

## Visa Fees

[deu > cmr > en > Study Visa]
*Please note that the service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in XAF is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only Service Charge.
- VFS Service fee is non refundable.

## Documents Required

Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the checklists given on link website of the visa section Cameroon (https://url.uk.m.mimecastprotect.com/s/HcYVCkovoUOXBYw7T2fEsGuMhU?domain=jaunde.diplo.de). There you will find all relevant information like requested documents checklist, duration of the application process, fees, where to apply, etc.

## Photo Specifications

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

## Processing Time

Note: The Visa should be applied for with sufficient time before planned departure. The processing time for complete application documents is currently around three months. Processing may be delayed due to incomplete application documents or irregular processing measures. There is no entitlement to the issue of a visa within the specified processing time.

## Online Application Forms

Below is the form that is required to be filled to submit your visa application:
- National Visa
 
Application Form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/#/videx-langfristiger-aufenthalt)
 (To be filled online - mandatory)
Instructions to complete an online form:
- Click on the form link above
- When the page opens complete the form
- Once complete print out the form on clear paper
- The complete printed set of your application form including the last barcoded page of your application form should be presented while submitting your application.
** The barcode page contains the necessary data in condensed and machine readable format.

visa_types.overview:
Overview

The prior approval must be given by the immigration authority (Ausländerbehörde) according to §81a AufenthG.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

The prior approval must be given by the immigration authority (Ausländerbehörde) according to §81a AufenthG.

## Visa Fees

[deu > cmr > en > Study Visa]
